pom.xml.general_idea: Bump Kotlin version from 1.5.31 to 1.9.21 to support newer language features and JDK 21 compatibility.
Update Vert.x framework from 4.1.5 to 4.5.1 for bug fixes and feature updates.
Bump Jackson BOM from 2.13.0 to 2.16.1 to ensure security patches and modern JSON processing.
Introduce a Maven profile for GraalVM native image compilation using the native-maven-plugin.
Add exec-maven-plugin to allow running the application directly via Maven using the defined main class.
Remove the Vert.x Hazelcast cluster manager dependency, likely simplifying the deployment model.
Switch from Logback and kotlin-logging to SLF4J Simple implementation, removing complex logging dependencies.
Replace the Aliyun Maven mirror with the standard Central Repository URL for broader compatibility.
Explicitly define plugin repositories to ensure plugins are resolved from Central, avoiding potential resolution issues.
Explicitly declare the project packaging as 'jar' to clarify the build output type.
Extract the main class name into a property for reuse in plugins like exec-maven-plugin and native-maven-plugin.
Bump flatten-maven-plugin from 1.2.7 to 1.5.0 for better POM management during builds.
Update git-commit-id-maven-plugin from 5.0.0 to 4.9.9 (note: version downgrade in number but likely specific compatibility choice or typo in log, treated as version update intent).

.editorconfig.general_idea: Add configuration to prevent trailing whitespace trimming in Markdown files.

.gitignore.general_idea: Ignore generated log directories to prevent committing runtime artifacts.
Ignore Gradle build output directory as the project migrated from Maven to Gradle.
Normalize the Maven target directory ignore pattern to include the trailing slash.
Explicitly include the Maven wrapper directory despite the broad .* ignore rule.
Explicitly include the GitHub Actions configuration directory despite the broad .* ignore rule.

README.md.general_idea: Rename the project from vertx-sse to vertx-server-push to reflect the new technology stack.
Update the project description to indicate it uses the STOMP protocol instead of Server-Sent Events.
README.md.human_impl: > 基于 stomp协议 的服务端推送

README.md.general_idea: Remove the link to the Server-Sent Events tutorial as it is no longer relevant to the STOMP-based implementation.
Add comprehensive instructions for running the project via Docker, Gradle, or IDE.
README.md.human_impl: 1. 运行项目(以下几种方式选一种) ... docker-compose up -d ... ./gradlew run

README.md.general_idea: Provide a concrete curl example to demonstrate how to send a push message to the server.

src/main/java/cn/mmooo/Main.kt.general_idea: Added import for org.slf4j.LoggerFactory to enable structured logging capabilities.
Replaced clustered Vert.x initialization with standard Vertx.vertx() and synchronous deployment within runOnContext to simplify startup logic.
Set system property to route Hazelcast logs to SLF4J for unified logging management.
Added an info-level log message upon application startup using the new SLF4J logger.

src/main/java/cn/mmooo/verticle/StompBri.general_idea: Migrate from KotlinLogging (SLF4J wrapper) to direct SLF4J LoggerFactory usage.
Replace hardcoded port 13000 with environment variable PUSH_PORT for container compatibility.
Consolidate router handlers into a single chain and add TimeoutHandler and StaticHandler.
Update failure handler to use SLF4J API for logging errors with cause.
Add a GET /health endpoint for container orchestration health checks.
Add informational logging for successful push requests.
Add support for STOMP v12 subprotocol in WebSocket configuration.
Update server startup log message to use SLF4J API and dynamic port.
